text.title: Subscription Lifecycle Edge Cases Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Subscription Lifecycle Edge Cases end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: audit
step.action: Audit current webhook coverage vs 8 cases.

step.name: implement
step.action: Wire missing webhooks with idempotent handlers.

step.name: test-cases
step.action: Test each of the 8 cases end-to-end in Stripe test mode.

step.name: document
step.action: Author runbook with each case + handler + email template.

step.name: monitor
step.action: Wire dashboard: failed payments, dunning emails, refund volume.
